hero.title: Accept Card Payments Across Algeria Instantly
hero.subtitle: Integrate local card processing (Dahabia & CIB) into your website with a single, modern API. No complex setups. No blockchain dependency.

features_section.title: Built for Modern Algerian Commerce
features_section.subtitle: Powering high-growth startups, marketplaces, and physical merchants with bulletproof payments.
features_section.f1_desc: Unified payment gateway that handles all local bank card authorizations smoothly with immediate settlement logs.
features_section.f2_desc: Send personalized billing links via WhatsApp, SMS, or Email. Receive dinars instantly without writing code.
features_section.f3_desc: Intelligent status monitoring engine ensures your transactions are kept up to date even when customers close the checkout tab.
features_section.f4_desc: Integrate securely with simple curl commands, detailed webhooks, and sandbox testing environments.

pricing_section.title: Transparent, Volume-Based Pricing
pricing_section.subtitle: Only pay for successful transactions. No setup fees, no monthly commitments.
pricing_section.standard_desc: Perfect for small businesses and e-commerce stores.
pricing_section.enterprise_desc: For large marketplaces requiring dedicated support.

terms_section.title: Terms of Service & Regulatory Compliance
terms_section.subtitle: Operating in complete compliance with Algerian payment regulations and banking frameworks.
terms_section.p1: By using our platform, you agree to our merchant terms, including mandatory Know Your Business (KYB) checks and adherence to AML (Anti-Money Laundering) requirements.
terms_section.p2: We serve as a technology facilitator. All user safeguarding funds are held in secure, bank-backed compensation accounts with partner financial institutions.
